ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2002_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! Would you like
to get some potato mochi?
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2003_01_10:
Tell me all about yourself,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! I want to be
even better friends!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2101_02_10: I thought it’d be useful for you.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2102_01_10:
Here! A little reward for you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2102_02_10:
You’re always working so hard. I hope
this helps.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2103_01_10:
I want to express my gratitude, so please—
take this!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2103_03_10: Next time, I’ll give you a handmade present!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2203_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ], let me share
my Pasio survey findings with you!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2301_01_10: This is amazing! Thank you so much!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2301_02_10:
Now THIS is something to be happy about!
My potato mochi is gonna taste so much
better!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2402_01_10:
Thanks for sharing! If you get a chance,
please tell me more sometime.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2401_01_10:
I feel like...we were able to understand
each other a little better.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8201_2401_02_10:
Let’s keep having these talks and learning
about each other!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8001_0701_01_10:
In a place like this, with so many friendly
people, one can truly relax. It’s nice.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8001_0701_02_10:
It brings back memories of running
around with the Galaxy Expedition Team
Survey Corps.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8001_0701_03_10:
It was tough, but we pushed through by
supporting each other!
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8002_0701_01_10:
Back in the Hisui region, we crafted a lot of
things with our own hands.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8002_0701_02_10:
Did you know our Pokédex was also made
by hand? The professor wrote everything
himself.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8002_0701_03_10:
It was hard work, but there’s a certain
charm to carefully writing each page one
by one, don’t you think?
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8003_0701_01_10:
Hisuian potato mochi brings back a lot of
memories for a member of the Galaxy
Expedition Team Survey Corps.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8003_0701_02_10:
We spent so many times sitting around a
table of potato mochi, talking about all
kinds of things.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8003_0701_03_10:
I’d love to find food here on Pasio I can
build similar memories around.
ch0291_00_sho_salon/8003_0701_04_10:
If you have any recommendations,
[Name:PlayerNickname ], please tell me.
We can have some together sometime!
